meaning: n.研究所学生,研究生adj.毕业后的
examples: The university has a well-established tradition of welcoming postgraduate students from overseas.
I'm in charge of all the admissions of postgraduate students in the university.
In a scruffy Budapest district, a postgraduate student from Cambridge is getting a bruising reception.
He also highlighted the rumbling anxiety among universities about the funding of postgraduate education.
Only postgraduate students or those sponsored by their governments will henceforward be allowed to bring dependants.
